summary: Campaign Scheduler Bug Fix Testing Complete - Iteration 227. All 3 bug fixes verified: 1) GET /campaigns/{user_id} returns 200 (not 500) - route ordering fixed; 2) GET /campaigns/scheduler/pending returns pending/upcoming counts; 3) POST /campaigns/scheduler/process returns sent/completed/pending_found. Backend: 12/12 tests pass (100%). Frontend: Campaign dashboard and list pages load correctly showing campaign stats.
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering fix verified: Static routes (/scheduler/pending, /scheduler/process, /templates/prebuilt) now BEFORE parameterized route (/{user_id})
CampaignSequenceStep.step now defaults to 0 instead of being required - campaigns with missing step field load correctly
Auto-assign step numbers: Lines 635-637 in campaigns.py loop through sequences and assign step=i+1 if missing
scheduler/pending correctly returns {pending: int, upcoming: int} for dashboard stats
scheduler/process correctly returns {sent, completed, pending_found} as alias for trigger_scheduler
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_campaign_scheduler_fix.py (new test file for scheduler bug fixes)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (13 campaigns, active enrollments)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Campaign scheduler route ordering bug is fixed. Static routes /scheduler/pending and /scheduler/process are now defined BEFORE /{user_id} in campaigns.py. Test user Forest Ward has 13 campaigns with 2 active, 11 upcoming, 22 completed enrollments. Campaign dashboard at /campaigns/dashboard shows stats correctly. CampaignSequenceStep.step defaults to 0 and is auto-assigned on load.

backend.GET /api/campaigns/templates/prebuilt: PASS - Returns 8 templates including cold_outreach_text, cold_outreach_email

frontend.Home screen: PASS - Loads with Today's Touchpoints (56 pending) and SEO Health widget
frontend.Campaigns list (/campaigns): PASS - Shows 10 active, 13 total campaigns with toggle switches
frontend.Campaign Dashboard (/campaigns/dashboard: PASS - Shows stats (2 Active, 11 Upcoming, 22 Completed) and enrollments list

bug_fixes_verified.scheduler_pending_endpoint: FIXED - New endpoint returns pending/upcoming counts for dashboard
bug_fixes_verified.scheduler_process_endpoint: FIXED - New endpoint as alias for trigger_scheduler with different response format
bug_fixes_verified.campaign_step_field: FIXED - CampaignSequenceStep.step changed from required to default=0, auto-assigned on load
